title: Terracore Create
description: A Modpack based on Create with some additional Mods like Farmer's Delight and MineColonies
body:
Terracore Create is a small, light-weight and well optimised modpack focused on the Create Mod and its addons (Like Create: Steam 'n' Rails or Destroy), though it also includes MineColonies and Farmer's Delight.

It comes in 2 variants: With and without shaders. If Shaders are included is marked in the version name.

The Terracore team offers a server with the Modpack, though it can be used in Singleplayer worlds as well. To join our server, simply visit our Discord.
